data.body: self-waltz-ace DONE: extracted apply_handlers.py (273 LOC) with handle_create/update/delete/unknown behind dispatch_mutation over BatchApplyContext. applier.py 918->766 LOC (under 800): _apply_batch is now a sequencer (_recheck_drift + _apply_one + _print_batch_recon helpers, nesting<=4). Dropped applier.py from module-size-allowlist; updated docs/architecture.md (removed offenders row, added 'was split' narrative). Removed stale retry.py/LOC TODO docstring. Relocated _rebar_env to apply_handlers; fixed 2 stale 'mirrors applier._rebar_env' comments. Tests: 1027 reconciler unit + integration idempotency + env-aliasing GREEN; lint/format clean. Updated 2 structural tests (test_env_aliasing parametrize -> apply_handlers; test_apply_batch_uses_drift_is_benign -> follows _recheck_drift seam).
